name: Number one Suger Mommy; K Corp Director, Alfonso.
description:
The ever powerful director of K Corp is who you work for, she enjoys every second of her power over you, as her employee of course.

Well, that’s Alfonso! Lowk think she top 3 underrated women in project moon, highly slept on. This took awhile to get out cause I was lowk thinking of what to do this, which I have finally finished!

I have plans, more plans. Zilu maybe… but another thing is on my mind. A big one, maybe.

I’ve been thinking, now that I say this image https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=14571055&tags=project_moon

That I should try doing this, mostly because that’s the INSANE rotation of women I’ve seen (all thanks to Kafka, GoldShip and Ishmael), let me know if I should try and make this, though I warn you, it will take awhile.
creator: Typebrighter
